data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Peppermint Innovation Limited ( (AU:PIL) ).

Peppermint Innovation Limited has lodged an updated notice with the ASX regarding a proposed placement of securities. The filing is made under Appendix 3B rules and relates to an issue of new shares or related securities that the company intends to have quoted on the exchange.

The update clarifies that a five per cent introduction fee is payable to the introducer of the specific investor group participating in the placement. This amendment provides more transparency on the transaction costs associated with the capital raising and may influence how investors assess the net proceeds and structuring of the offer.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PIL) stock is a Sell with a A$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Peppermint Innovation Limited stock, see the AU:PIL Stock Forecast page.

More about Peppermint Innovation Limited

Peppermint Innovation Limited is an Australian-listed company on the ASX under the code PIL. The business operates in the technology and financial services space, focusing on digital and fintech-related offerings for its target markets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$10.04M

The latest update is out from Black Dragon Gold Corp. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 1 Sh ( (AU:EM3) ).

EMC Gold Corporation has issued 1,500,000 new Chess Depositary Interests at $0.03 each following the conversion of unlisted options, modestly increasing its equity base without a full disclosure document under Australian corporations law. The company confirmed its compliance with financial reporting and continuous disclosure obligations and stated there is no excluded information that investors would reasonably require, signalling regulatory alignment as it advances its Salave and Australian gold exploration assets.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:EM3) stock is a Hold with a A$0.09 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Black Dragon Gold Corp. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 1 Sh stock, see the AU:EM3 Stock Forecast page.

More about Black Dragon Gold Corp. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 1 Sh

EMC Gold Corporation is an exploration company with a global portfolio of assets focused on gold. Its flagship asset is the 100%-owned Salave project in Asturias, northern Spain, regarded as one of Europe’s largest undeveloped gold projects. The company also holds an exploration permit at Ivan Well in Western Australia, offering further potential for surface and sub-surface gold discoveries.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

IK HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd. ( (JP:2722) ) has shared an update.

IK HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd. reported consolidated sales of 1,059 million yen for February 2026, a 25.3% year-on-year decline, with cumulative sales for the current fiscal year down to 11,231 million yen and 95.2% of the prior-year level. The Direct Marketing Business generated 197 million yen in February sales, down 22.2% year-on-year, while the Sales Marketing Business posted 861 million yen, down 26.0%, signaling continued weakness in both core segments and a moderating growth trend that may weigh on the company’s near-term revenue momentum and market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:2722) stock is a Hold with a Yen428.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on IK HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd. stock, see the JP:2722 Stock Forecast page.

More about IK HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd.

IK HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd., listed on the TSE Standard Market and NSE Premier Market, operates through two main segments: a Direct Marketing Business and a Sales Marketing Business. The group focuses on consolidated sales performance across these segments, reflecting its role in Japan’s broader marketing and distribution industry.

Average Trading Volume: 18,407

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Flight Centre Travel Group Limited ( (AU:FLT) ) has shared an update.

Flight Centre Travel Group Limited has notified the market of the issue of 30,730 ordinary fully paid shares following the conversion or exercise of previously unquoted options or other unquoted convertible securities. The new securities, issued on 27 February 2026, slightly expand the company’s share base and reflect ongoing utilisation of equity-based instruments within its capital management and employee or investor incentive structures.

The conversion of these unquoted securities into listed ordinary shares marginally dilutes existing shareholders but also signals alignment of option or security holders with long-term equity value. While the size of the issuance is modest relative to Flight Centre’s total capital, such movements are closely watched by investors as indicators of management incentives, confidence, and the evolution of the company’s capital structure.

data.title: BrainChip Updates Director Peter Van Der Made’s Equity Holdings After Rights Vesting
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

BrainChip Holdings ( (AU:BRN) ) just unveiled an update.

BrainChip Holdings has disclosed a change in the holdings of director Peter Van Der Made, following the vesting and lapse of performance rights granted to him. As a result of the vesting, he received 171,722 fully paid ordinary shares at no cash consideration, while 429,302 performance rights were disposed of, increasing his total direct shareholding to 156,977,545 shares.

The transaction did not involve any trading during a closed period and required no disclosure of interests in separate contracts. The adjustment reflects routine equity-based remuneration mechanics rather than a market purchase or sale, clarifying the director’s updated equity stake and maintaining transparency for shareholders under ASX disclosure rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:BRN) stock is a Hold with a A$0.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BrainChip Holdings stock, see the AU:BRN Stock Forecast page.

More about BrainChip Holdings

BrainChip Holdings Ltd is a technology company focused on advanced computing solutions, including neuromorphic and AI-driven products for edge and embedded applications. The company is listed on the ASX and its securities include fully paid ordinary shares and performance rights issued to executives and directors as part of their remuneration and incentive structures.

data.description:

The latest update is out from Kinaxis Inc ( (TSE:KXS) ).

Kinaxis Inc., a Canadian supply chain orchestration specialist, develops the AI-powered Maestro platform to help global enterprises manage complex supply chains with greater transparency and agility. Its software supports planning and execution across entire networks, positioning the company as a key technology partner for brands navigating logistics volatility.

Kinaxis announced that Chief Financial Officer Blaine Fitzgerald will leave the company in May 2026 to pursue a role at a private firm outside the supply chain software sector, with a search for his successor already underway. The company emphasized its strong recent financial performance, record profitability, and AI-driven growth momentum, suggesting leadership bench strength and continuity in its long-term strategy despite the executive transition.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:KXS) stock is a Buy with a C$180.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kinaxis Inc stock, see the TSE:KXS Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:KXS stock, click here.

More about Kinaxis Inc

Kinaxis Inc., based in Ottawa, is a global leader in modern supply chain orchestration software, serving complex global supply chains with its AI-infused Maestro platform. The company focuses on providing transparency and agility from long-term strategic planning through last-mile delivery, and is trusted by major global brands to manage volatility and disruption in their supply networks.

data.title: CITIC Resources Halts Trading Ahead of Discloseable Transaction Announcement
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

CITIC Resources Holdings ( (HK:1205) ) has issued an announcement.

CITIC Resources Holdings has requested a halt in trading of its shares on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, effective from 9:00 a.m. on 5 March 2026. The suspension precedes the release of an announcement that will contain inside information and details of a discloseable transaction under Hong Kong listing rules, signaling a potentially significant corporate development for shareholders and the market.

The pending discloseable transaction suggests CITIC Resources may be undertaking a deal of notable size relative to its assets, which could affect its financial profile, strategic direction or asset base once details are released. Investors and other stakeholders are likely to watch closely for the forthcoming announcement to assess its impact on valuation, governance considerations and the company’s positioning within the resources industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1205) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.58 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CITIC Resources Holdings stock, see the HK:1205 Stock Forecast page.

More about CITIC Resources Holdings

CITIC Resources Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong–listed company incorporated in Bermuda, operating in the resources sector and traded on the Main Board of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong. The company is overseen by a board comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors, reflecting a standard listed-company governance structure in the region.

Average Trading Volume: 10,785,918

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$4.4B

data.title: Orbminco Director Angus Middleton Increases Indirect Shareholding
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Woomera Mining Ltd. ( (AU:OB1) ) is now available.

Orbminco Limited has disclosed a change in director Angus Middleton’s relevant interest in the company’s securities, following a series of on-market share purchases executed between 26 February and 2 March 2026. The notice reflects compliance with ASX listing rule 3.19A.2, which requires timely reporting of directors’ dealings to ensure transparency for investors.

Middleton’s indirect holding, via Tornado Nominees Pty Ltd as trustee for the Angus Middleton Superfund, increased by 688,239 ordinary shares for a cash consideration of $11,011. As a result, his total indirect interest rose from 38,703,924 to 39,392,163 ordinary shares, signaling a modest vote of confidence in the company without altering any contract-related interests.

More about Woomera Mining Ltd.

Orbminco Limited is an Australia-listed company operating in the mining and resources sector. The company is involved in the exploration and development of mineral assets, with its securities traded on the ASX and overseen under local corporate and listing regulations.

Average Trading Volume: 494,050

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Medallion Metals to Brief Investors After Forrestania Nickel Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Medallion Metals Ltd ( (AU:MM8) ) has shared an announcement.

Medallion Metals Limited has announced it will host an investor briefing webinar on 11 March 2026, giving shareholders and potential investors direct access to Managing Director Paul Bennett. The session follows the recent completion of the Forrestania Nickel Operation acquisition, signalling the company’s efforts to deepen engagement as it integrates this newly acquired asset.

The webinar, scheduled for mid-morning Perth time and mid-afternoon on the east coast, will include a live Q&A segment and the option to submit questions in advance. This initiative underscores Medallion’s push for transparency and investor outreach at a key moment in its growth trajectory, as stakeholders seek clarity on how the Forrestania transaction will shape future operations and value.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MM8) stock is a Buy with a A$0.87 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Medallion Metals Ltd stock, see the AU:MM8 Stock Forecast page.

More about Medallion Metals Ltd

Medallion Metals Limited is an Australian resources company listed on the ASX that focuses on acquiring and developing mineral assets. The company operates in the mining sector, and its recent activities include expanding its portfolio through the acquisition of the Forrestania Nickel Operation from IGO Limited, positioning it within the nickel resources space.
